next_steps: Perform magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and magnetic resonance venography (MRV) of the brain
Perform urgent ophthalmologic examination for papilledema or funduscopic signs of intracranial hypertension
Check erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP)
Perform lumbar puncture with opening pressure measurement, cell counts, protein, glucose, and cultures
Monitor serial coagulation studies and correct coagulopathy as necessary
Avoid barbiturates and minimize opioid use while neuro-deterioration is active
Evaluate for signs of dural puncture or spinal CSF leak secondary to recent procedures
